waterDepth.label: Κανονικό βάθος
waterDepth.notes: Η επίσημη ταυτότητα κολύμβησης αναφέρει κανονικό βάθος στα πρώτα μέτρα και ήπια κλίση πυθμένα.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 audit 2026-05-25: kept beach bar; Makri/Agios Georgios sources support beach-bar service and organized beach amenities.

High-confidence Evros follow-up 2026-06-02: the official Agios Georgios Makris bathing profile supports road access by private vehicle, mostly sandy shore with a gravel/pebble eastern part, normal first-meter depth, partial seasonal organization with loungers/umbrellas, and restaurant/refreshment context. Regional wind/protection wording from the profile was not imported into static app claims. No windProfile, scoring, live calm/protected/safe, or ideal-beach claim was changed.

sourceNotes: Popular source upgrade 2026-06-02: AlexandroupoliPortal lists Dikella as a large beach west of Alexandroupoli and Agia Paraskevi/Kyani Akti as one of the more organized beaches with beach bars and watersports.
E-evros local business listings support multiple beach bars/restaurants on Paralia Dikellon and Agia Paraskevi, including sunbed/beach-bar context.

Additional local/travel pages support sandy beach character for Dikella and shallow/family-friendly water for Agia Paraskevi/Makri. No windProfile, scoring, photos, or live calm/safe claims were changed.
